title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the wrapper logic around a coding agent from the model itself, comprising two levels: an AI layer managing rules, skills, hooks, and subagents for a single session, and orchestration of multiple agent sessions into focused workflows to reliably handle larger tasks at scale.
